description: You are the digital marketing manager at Velour & Stitch, a fashion e-commerce brand. Create a shopping cart price rule named 'BACK2SCHOOL25' for the General customer group that provides a 25% discount on orders with a subtotal of at least $75. Configure the rule with Priority 1, Stop Further Rules Processing enabled, and an expiry date of 12/31/2025. Use auto-generated coupons with the prefix 'B2S', limited to 5 uses per coupon and 1 use per customer. Generate exactly 10 coupon codes for this rule. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
